query:
-- 1. Fontes registradas
SELECT source_id, name, type, effective_date, total_pages, total_chars, status
FROM regulatory_sources
ORDER BY effective_date;

-- 2. Artigos por fonte
SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) as total_artigos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='artigo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as artigos_raiz,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='paragrafo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paragrafos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='inciso' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incisos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='alinea' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alineas
FROM regulatory_articles
GROUP BY source_id
ORDER BY source_id;

-- 3. Requisitos por fonte e tipo
SELECT source_id, normative_type, normative_scope, 
       COUNT(*) as total,
       SUM(CASE WHEN is_operational=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as operacionais
FROM regulatory_requirements
GROUP BY source_id, normative_type, normative_scope
ORDER BY source_id, normative_type;

-- 4. Totais gerais
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_requisitos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_operational=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as operacionais,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='contribuinte' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contribuinte,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='ente_federativo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ente_federativo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='meta_norma' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as meta_norma,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='administrativo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as administrativo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='sistemico' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sistemico
FROM regulatory_requirements;

-- 5. Canonical requirements
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_canonico,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_multi_source=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as multi_source,
  SUM(CASE WHEN risk_base='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as risk_high,
  SUM(CASE WHEN risk_base='medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as risk_medium,
  SUM(CASE WHEN risk_base='low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as risk_low,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='obrigacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as obrigacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='direito' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direitos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='vedacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vedacoes
FROM canonical_requirements;

-- 6. Coverage reports
SELECT report_id, source_id, requirements_total, coverage_percent, version, generated_at
FROM coverage_reports
ORDER BY generated_at;
